meaning: n.婊ョ敤,铏愬緟,杈遍獋,闄嬩範,寮婄v.婊ョ敤,铏愬緟,杈遍獋
examples: Rival fans hurled abuse at each other.
The abuse was directed at the TV crews.
Quick-thinking TV bosses bleeped out the abuse.
Still, stock loan is a business that is ripe for abuse, at least according to investigators.
Haringey Council was severely criticised following the death, after sustained abuse, of 17-month-old Baby P in August 2007.
